'''Kaell 115''' was the leader of [[Dorsk 81]]'s home city at the time he left for the [[Jedi Praxeum]] in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]]. His line had been running the city's politics for decades.

==Appearances==
*[[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']] {{1stm}}
